name: Alex Rivera (Demo)
short_bio: DEMO PROFILE — This profile demonstrates all InkwellMedia creator features using placeholder content.
full_bio: This is a demonstration profile created to showcase all available InkwellMedia creator features. Alex Rivera is a fictional creator used for testing and previewing the platform. All content, images, and descriptions on this profile are placeholder data and do not represent a real person or business.

albums.title: Digital Landscapes Collection
albums.description: A curated collection of digital landscape artwork exploring light and shadow. This is demonstration content.

blogs.title: Hello World — My First Post (Demo)
blogs.summary: A demonstration blog post showing the blog feature on InkwellMedia.
blogs.content:
This is a placeholder blog post.

Real creators write their own content here. You can include multiple paragraphs of plain text. Line breaks are preserved when displayed on the site.

This post is part of the demo-creator profile used for testing and showcasing the InkwellMedia platform features. It is clearly labelled as demonstration content and does not represent real advice, news, or information.
blogs.author: Alex Rivera
